summary: Profile of Cavallo CEO Greg Giles, a former footwear and sports-marketing executive who took up riding and now leads the hoof-boot company.
Follow-up testimonial from barefoot practitioner Marianne Allen on foundered mare Lilla Gumman recovering through trimming and Cavallo hoof boots.
Author Joe Camp answers a new owner's saddle-fit question and endorses the lightweight Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pad.
Short customer testimonial about riding a barefoot Rocky Mountain Horse safely through snow and ice using Cavallo boots with ice studs.
Casual recap of attending the Functional Hoof Conference in Australia, including conversations with researchers Brian Hampson and Chris Pollitt.
News on Cavallo's sponsorship of ATHRA (Australian Trail Horse Riders Association) and a joint record-setting trail ride with ACTHA.
Reflection on a Cesar Millan talk about calm-assertive leadership with animals, tying it to horse care and Cavallo hoof boots.
Announcement that Saddlery Trading Company will distribute Cavallo hoof boots and saddle pads across 800+ Australian tack stores.
Customer testimonial detailing how Cavallo Simple Boots stayed on through demanding muddy, rocky trail courses where other boots failed.
ACTHA member Ann Harris testimonial praising the easy-to-use Cavallo Simple Boot, gel inserts, and western saddle pad for her horse Marty.
Post highlighting Cavallo's customer support, with a thank-you note about staffer Krystle helping a customer choose the right hoof boot fit.
President Carole Herder reflects on the Functional Hoof Conference in Australia, positioning Cavallo as a trusted authority on hoof health.
